title: Hormozi - No Growth No Shame (Full)
transcript: If you have no growth, you should have no shame. Knock, call, DM, email, ask. Life-changing doors don't open themselves. Worst case scenario, you're in the exact same position you were before you knocked, except you have more experience. Best case scenario, the door opens and your life changes forever. And so it's a zero-risk move to take more shots on goal when life gives you unlimited shots. But the problem is most people don't want to take the first one because they fear risk more than they fear regret. And so if you have more fear around not accomplishing your goals, then if you do of taking risk, then I have something cool for you. So my team put together the exact findings of studying our entire portfolio companies across all stages of growth, where we got stuck, and most importantly, what we did to scale to the next level. And you can grab it for free at the link somewhere around here. And if you're feeling extra ambitious or you're my kind of business owner on the next page you'll have the opportunity to book a call with our team no obligation but it's just a way for us to provide more value to you and see if we can help you apply this stuff to your business right now that much faster in person at our headquarters. So either way, enjoy the roadmap and for the few crazy business owners who want to take the plunge, I can't wait to meet you.

hook.text: If you have no growth, you should have no shame.

sections.name: Hook - Permission
sections.summary: Da permiso para no tener vergüenza y tomar acción (knock, call, DM)

sections.name: Reframe - Zero risk
sections.summary: Worst/best case: es zero-risk tomar shots cuando la vida da unlimited shots

sections.name: Bridge - Fear vs regret
sections.summary: El problema es que la gente teme más al riesgo que al arrepentimiento

sections.name: Offer + Dual CTA
sections.summary: Roadmap gratis + book a call para crazy business owners

structure.rehook_text: But the problem is most people don't want to take the first one

key_phrases: they fear risk more than they fear regret
for the few crazy business owners

cta.text: grab it for free at the link somewhere around here

analysis.emotional_arc: Permiso/validación → reframe de riesgo como zero-sum → separación entre miedosos y ambiciosos → oferta para los ambiciosos
strengths: Hook que da PERMISO en vez de presionar
Dual CTA con identidad: 'for the few crazy business owners'
Tono de invitación, nunca de presión
patterns_to_replicate: Patrón PERMISO como hook: en vez de señalar el dolor, dar permiso para actuar sin vergüenza
Worst case/Best case framework: presentar ambos escenarios para demostrar que es zero-risk
Identidad en el CTA: 'if you're my kind of business owner' filtra y halaga al mismo tiempo
'fear risk more than they fear regret' - reencuadre emocional potente
